title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1530 - Application of sections 375.1500 to 375.1527
text:
375.1530.  Application of sections 375.1500 to 375.1527. — Sections 375.1500 to 375.1527 shall only apply to policies governed by sections 375.1500 to 375.1527 which are marketed after January 1, 1999.
(L. 1998 S.B. 722 § 16)
